subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in East Asia | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-7885
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in East Asia. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Albert Einstein as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-7885. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: quality, quality.
